AlarmNames.description: The names of the alarms to retrieve information about.

AlarmNamePrefix.description: An alarm name prefix. If specified, only alarms with names that start with this prefix are returned.

AlarmTypes.description: Specify this parameter to receive information only about alarms of the specified types.

ChildrenOfAlarmName.description: If you use this parameter and specify the name of a composite alarm, the operation returns information about the child alarms.

ParentsOfAlarmName.description: If you use this parameter and specify the name of a metric alarm, the operation returns information about the composite alarms that reference it.

ActionPrefix.description: Use this parameter to filter the results to only those alarms that use a certain alarm action.

MaxRecords.description: The maximum number of alarm descriptions to retrieve.

NextToken.description: The token returned by a previous call to indicate there is more data available.
